questions.question: Describe the main difference between a Datagram and a Packet in the context of computer networking. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the difference between error-free delivery and delivery confirmation

questions.question: Which routing protocol is known for its distance vector approach and uses a hop count to determine the best path for forwarding packets? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Consider the trade-offs between simplicity and optimality

questions.question: Explain how BGP (Border Gateway Protocol) differs from OSPF (Open Shortest Path First) in terms of routing decision-making. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Compare and contrast the two protocols in the context of multi-hop routing
